# AI Simulations

This project area explores how artificial intelligence can support social psychological research while keeping human judgment, theory, and empirical validation at the center.

## Core question

How can AI help generate, critique, simulate, or improve research ideas without replacing empirical evidence or researcher accountability?

## Possible uses

- Generating candidate study materials
- Stress-testing survey items
- Simulating possible participant interpretations
- Identifying unclear claims or missing limitations
- Supporting reproducible analysis and documentation

## Next actions

- Define safe and useful AI roles in the research workflow.
- Compare AI-generated materials with human-written materials.
- Document cases where AI suggestions are helpful, misleading, or theoretically shallow.
